methods.boolean contains(Range range): Checks if another range is within the bounds of this range.
methods.boolean contains(T value): Checks if the value is within the bounds of this range.
methods.Range create(T lower, T upper): Create a new immutable range, with the argument types inferred.
methods.Range extend(Range range): Returns the smallest range that includes this range and another range.
methods.Range extend(T value): Returns the smallest range that includes this range and the value.
methods.Range extend(T lower, T upper): Returns the smallest range that includes this range and the inclusive range specified by [lower, upper].
methods.int hashCode(): Returns a hash code value for the object.
methods.Range intersect(T lower, T upper): Returns the intersection of this range and the inclusive range specified by [lower, upper].
methods.Range intersect(Range range): Returns the intersection of this range and another range.
methods.String toString(): Return the range as a string representation "[lower, upper]".
